MYFIRSTCHARACTER-ASHBOUND.description: If this card is exhausted during your turn, play it.
MYFIRSTCHARACTER-ASHBOUND.title: Ashbound
MYFIRSTCHARACTER-RIGGED.description: At the end of your turn, if this card is on top of your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold], play it.
MYFIRSTCHARACTER-RIGGED.title: Rigged
MYFIRSTCHARACTER-SEMPITERNAL.description: At the end of your turn, if this card is in your [gold]Exhaust Pile[/gold], play it.
MYFIRSTCHARACTER-SEMPITERNAL.title: Sempiternal
